_planted_violations_for_demo: EEOC-ADEA-AGE (young, energetic, digital native, recent grad)
PAYTRANS-CA-SB1162 (CA employer, no salary range in posting)

job_posting:
Software Engineer — Acme Robotics (San Francisco, on-site)

We're hiring a young, energetic software engineer to join our fast-moving team. The ideal candidate is a recent grad and a digital native who lives and breathes code. You must be a native English speaker with flawless communication. This is an on-site role; you must be able to lift 40 lbs of robotics equipment as needed.

Responsibilities: build and ship backend services, collaborate across teams, move fast.
Requirements: 0-3 years experience, BS in CS, fluency in Python and Go.

Apply now — tell us your current salary so we can calibrate the offer.

criteria.name: Culture fit
criteria.note: Does the candidate feel like one of us?
